name: scroll-area-horizontal-demo
visual_summary: A scrollable area with a horizontal bar that displays a horizontal scroll bar when the content exceeds the available width, often used in applications with lists or information that spans across the screen.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: scroll-area-horizontal-demo
Description: A scrollable area with a horizontal bar that displays a horizontal scroll bar when the content exceeds the available width, often used in applications with lists or information that spans across the screen.
Style: modern
Interactions: smooth, animated
Tags: scrollable, horizontal, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
